R12_PAYEE_MATCHES_CHECKOUT_OR_TASK.detail: Payee is not a registered merchant receiving address

anatomy.summary: The payment recipient is replaced with an attacker wallet while the mandate still expects the approved merchant.
steps: Honest checkout binds the merchant payee
Attack swaps settlement.payTo
Verifier compares payee against allowedPayees and merchant identity

mutations.impact: Funds would route to an address outside the human-approved merchant constraint.

B0.note: Vanilla x402 has no CLB or evidence verifier signal.

B1.note: AP2 mandate exists, but nonce is not bound to C and payment is not prevented.

B2.note: ACEL verifier detects post-settlement; no x402 enforcement.

B3.note: Live B3 detected by verifier or audit-layer check.

anatomy.summary: The settlement amount is raised above the user-approved spending limit.
steps: Honest mandate caps spend at 2.00
Attack submits a 3.00 settlement
Verifier checks settled value against maxAmount

mutations.impact: The merchant would collect more than the mandate permits.

B0.note: Vanilla x402 has no CLB or evidence verifier signal.

B1.note: AP2 mandate exists, but nonce is not bound to C and payment is not prevented.

B2.note: ACEL verifier detects post-settlement; no x402 enforcement.

B3.note: Live B3 detected by verifier or audit-layer check.

anatomy.summary: The payment asset changes from the allowed EURC asset to USDC.
steps: Honest mandate allows EURC
Attack submits a USDC settlement
Verifier checks settlement asset against allowedAssets

mutations.impact: The user did not authorize this asset for payment.

B0.note: Vanilla x402 has no CLB or evidence verifier signal.

B1.note: AP2 mandate exists, but nonce is not bound to C and payment is not prevented.

B2.note: ACEL verifier detects post-settlement; no x402 enforcement.

B3.note: Live B3 detected by verifier or audit-layer check.

anatomy.summary: A settlement from another chain domain is presented inside the Base Sepolia trace.
steps: Honest CLB domain binds chain 84532
Attack transplants settlement.chainId to 1
Verifier compares domain, descriptor, identity, and settlement chain

mutations.impact: The settlement no longer belongs to the chain domain committed by C.

B0.note: Vanilla x402 has no CLB or evidence verifier signal.

B1.note: AP2 mandate exists, but nonce is not bound to C and payment is not prevented.

B2.note: ACEL verifier detects post-settlement; no x402 enforcement.

B3.note: Live B3 detected by verifier or audit-layer check.

R4_AGENT_PAYMENT_KEY_AUTHORIZED.detail: Payer 0x70997970C51812dc3A010C7d01b50e0d17dc79C8 not authorized by agent card

anatomy.summary: The payer key used by settlement is no longer authorized by the bound shopping-agent identity.
steps: Honest agent card authorizes the shopper key
Attack swaps the authorized payment key set
Verifier checks settlement payer against the bound agent card

mutations.impact: The settlement payer cannot be attributed to the authorized shopping agent.

B0.note: Vanilla x402 has no CLB or evidence verifier signal.

B1.note: AP2 identity exists, but key authorization is not enforced in payment.

B2.note: ACEL verifier detects post-settlement; no x402 enforcement.

B3.note: Live B3 detected by verifier or audit-layer check.

anatomy.summary: The same CLB-derived x402 nonce is submitted twice to replay an already-consumed mandate payment.
steps: Honest settlement consumes nonce = H(C)
Attack resubmits the same payment payload
x402 rejects the second nonce and verifier records replay evidence

mutations.impact: The trace records a second settlement attempt against the same nonce.

B0.note: Vanilla x402 without CLB replay audit does not expose mandate replay.

B1.note: AP2-only does not bind replay freshness to C.

B2.note: Audit-only detects replay evidence but cannot prevent settlement.

B3.note: Live B3 prevented at x402 replay enforcement and verifier flagged R9.

R15_TASK_HASH_MATCHES.detail: Report inputDataHash does not match mandate taskHash

anatomy.summary: The mandate pins one task hash, but the delivered report still describes different input data.
steps: Honest report input hash is produced
Attack sets mandate.constraints.taskHash to another hash
Verifier compares taskHash with report.inputDataHash

mutations.impact: The delivered report is no longer bound to the task authorized in the mandate.
The report stays on the old input, exposing the mismatch with taskHash.

B0.note: Vanilla x402 has no CLB or evidence verifier signal.

B1.note: Mandate task binding is not checked at payment time.

B2.note: ACEL verifier detects post-settlement; no x402 enforcement.

B3.note: Live B3 detected by verifier or audit-layer check.

anatomy.summary: The payment settles, but the delivered report hash is broken so delivery cannot be authenticated.
steps: Honest merchant signs a report hash
Attack tampers with report.reportHash
Verifier recomputes report content and signature binding

mutations.impact: The delivery proof no longer authenticates the report content.

B0.note: Vanilla x402 has no CLB or evidence verifier signal.

B1.note: AP2 mandate exists, but nonce is not bound to C and payment is not prevented.

B2.note: Audit-only detects invalid delivery evidence after settlement.

B3.note: Live B3 detected by verifier or audit-layer check.

auditCheck.detail: Feedback event has no prior VERIFICATION_CERTIFICATE evidence

anatomy.summary: A positive ERC-8004 feedback event is appended without a prior verification certificate.
steps: Honest evidence trace ends after delivery
Attack appends ERC8004_FEEDBACK
Audit check requires feedback to be backed by verifier evidence

mutations.impact: The reputation signal is not backed by a verified trace.

B0.note: Vanilla x402 has no CLB or evidence verifier signal.

B1.note: AP2 mandate exists, but nonce is not bound to C and payment is not prevented.

B2.note: ACEL graph audit catches feedback without certificate evidence.

B3.note: Live B3 detected by verifier or audit-layer check.

auditCheck.detail: Discovery selected a merchant outside allowedPayees

anatomy.summary: Discovery evidence shows the agent selected a merchant payee outside the user-approved allowedPayees list.
steps: Honest mandate constrains allowedPayees
Attack logs an injected merchant selection
Audit check compares selectedPayee with mandate constraints

mutations.impact: The selected merchant violates the user's payee constraint before payment.

B0.note: Vanilla x402 has no CLB or evidence verifier signal.

B1.note: AP2 mandate exists, but nonce is not bound to C and payment is not prevented.

B2.note: ACEL logged constraints expose the unauthorized merchant selection.

B3.note: Live B3 detected by verifier or audit-layer check.

B3.note: Live B3 detected by verifier or audit-layer check.
